---
id: clear-vrm-expressions
title: "Clear all VRM expressions"
description: "Reset all expression weights to 0 for the specified VRM model."
sidebar_label: "Clear all VRM expressions"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "delete api-method"
info_path: docs/reference/api/homunculus-api
custom_edit_url: null

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Clear all VRM expressions"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"delete"}
  path={"/vrm/{entity_id}/expressions"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Reset all expression weights to 0 for the specified VRM model.

  as={"h2"}
